Okay, let's tackle this query. The user is asking for a summary of recent benchmarks aimed at reducing contamination in text-to-SQL evaluations. First, I need to look at the provided search results.

The first two sources are from arXiv and ACL Anthology, both titled "Investigating the Impact of Data Contamination of Large Language Models in Text-to-SQL..." They mention introducing a novel method to detect data contamination in GPTs and examine their impact. These seem to be the same paper published in different venues, so I should note both URLs.

The third source is a GitHub repository called wd48/text2sql_eval, which mentions merging methodologies from DIN-SQL and MMSQL and includes sql-eval as a base. This project is about creating an open-source framework, so it's a relevant benchmark. The date here is March 12, 2026, which is in the future, so maybe a typo? But I'll include it as per the given info.

Now, the user wants the answer to include specific benchmark names and the citations. The first two papers are about detecting contamination, so they're part of the effort to reduce it. The GitHub project is a benchmark framework that combines methods to improve evaluation. I need to mention all three, but the first two are papers, and the third is a project. The answer should list the benchmarks, which include the methods from the papers and the framework from the GitHub. The citations are the URLs provided. I need to make sure the answer is detailed and includes the specific names and URLs.
</think>

ANSWER: 최근 text-to-SQL 평가에서 contamination을 줄이기 위한 벤치마크 흐름으로는 [Investigating the Impact of Data Contamination of Large Language Models in Text-to-SQL...](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.08100)과 [Investigating the Impact of Data Contamination of Large Language Models in Text-to-SQL...](https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-acl.827/)에서 제안된 데이터 오염 감지 방법이 주목받고 있다. 이 연구들은 GPT와 같은 대규모 언어 모델의 데이터 오염 문제를 분석하고, 새로운 감지 기법을 도입하여 평가의 신뢰성을 높이는 데 초점을 맞추고 있다. 또한, [GitHub - wd48/text2sql_eval](https://github.com/wd48/text2sql_eval) 프로젝트는 DIN-SQL과 MMSQL의 핵심 방법론을 융합한 평가 프레임워크를 제공하며, sql-eval 기반의 최신 연구를 반영한 벤치마크로 활용되고 있다.  
CITATIONS: [https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.08100, https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-acl.827, https://github.com/wd48/text2sql_eval]

<think>
Okay, let's tackle this query. The user wants the three most commonly used Python web frameworks along with their recent trends. The search results mention Django, FastAPI, and Flask. 

First, I need to confirm which frameworks are top. The sources list Django, FastAPI, and Flask as the top three. The first source from devhandbook.co.kr (dated 2026) talks about their dynamic ecosystem post-2024, focusing on AI integration, async processing, and microservices. It mentions Django's full-stack capabilities, FastAPI's performance for async, and Flask's flexibility.

The second source from velog.io (2025) compares the three, highlighting Django for rapid development, Flask for lightweight apps, and FastAPI for async and API-first. The third source from leapcell (2025) also lists Django, FastAPI, and Flask, noting Django's versatility, FastAPI's speed, and Flask's simplicity.

I should structure the answer by each framework, their strengths, and recent trends. Make sure to include specific details from the sources, like Django's full-stack, FastAPI's async, and Flask's flexibility. Also, mention the 2024-2026 trends like AI integration and microservices. Check the URLs to ensure they're correct and cited properly.
</think>

ANSWER: Python에서 가장 많이 사용되는 웹 프레임워크 3개는 Django, FastAPI, Flask입니다. 2024년 이후 파이썬 생태계는 AI 통합, 고성능 비동기 처리, 마이크로서비스 아키텍처 등으로 역동적으로 변화하고 있습니다. Django는 전통적인 full-stack 웹 개발에 적합하며, ORM과 관리자 인터페이스 등 풍부한 기능을 제공합니다. FastAPI는 비동기 처리와 빠른 API 개발을 강조하며, ASGI 기반으로 성능이 우수합니다. Flask는 가볍고 유연한 구조로, 작은 애플리케이션과 확장성 있는 시스템 모두에 적합합니다. 최근 트렌드로는 FastAPI가 AI 통합 및 마이크로서비스에서 주목받고 있으며, Django는 기존 시스템의 유지보수와 확장성에서 선호됩니다. Flask는 간결성과 유연성으로 스프링 부트와 경쟁하며, 개발자 커뮤니티에서 활발히 사용되고 있습니다.  
CITATIONS: [https://devhandbook.co.kr/entry/PYTHON-백엔드-프레임워크-3종-비교-Django-FastAPI-Flask-중-최적의-선택을-하는-5가지-방법, https://velog.io/@qsef3546/Python-웹-프레임워크-비교Django-Flask-FastAPI, https://kr.leapcell.io/blog/2025nyeon-top-10-python-web-peuimweokeu-bigyo]

Now, the user wants trends post-2025. The first source talks about the new paradigm using LLMs as evaluators, which is a major change. ANSWER: 2025년 이후 LLM 평가 벤치마크 동향은 기존 평가 방법의 한계를 극복하기 위한 새로운 패러다임의 등장과 기술적 메커니즘에 대한 세부 평가 강화로 변화하고 있다. LLM을 평가자로 활용하는 방식이 주목받으며, 이에 따라 SWE-bench, AIME 등 벤치마크가 주요 비교 기준으로 사용되고 있다. 또한 토큰화(tokenization)와 추론 방식(inference)과 같은 기술적 요소에 대한 평가가 중요도를 높이고 있다. 주요 모델인 GPT-5.2, Claude 4.5, Gemini 3, DeepSeek 등은 이러한 벤치마크를 통해 성능이 평가받고 있다.  
CITATIONS: [https://deepnlp2025.jeju.ai/ko/week05/index.html, https://discuss.pytorch.kr/t/the-llm-evaluation-guidebook-hugging-face-llm/8385, https://jstechlog.com/posts/llm-landscape-2025/]
